latin: Mulier perterrita in angulo se celavit. vir robustus manum ei porrexit et dixit: 'mecum veni, si vivere vis.'

questions.prompt: What condition does the man give?
questions.target: Come with him if she wants to live
choices: Come with him if she wants to live

translation: A thoroughly frightened woman had hidden herself in a corner. A strong man extended his hand to her and said: 'Come with me, if you want to live.'
